claim: Paige Ostroushko was arrested for assaulting reporter Savanah Hernandez during an anti-ICE protest, with videos showing the incident and charges to be filed.

sub_questions.question: Was Paige Ostroushko arrested in relation to an incident involving Savanah Hernandez?
Did Paige Ostroushko assault Savanah Hernandez?
Did the incident occur during an anti-ICE protest?
Are there videos showing the incident?
Were charges filed against Paige Ostroushko for this incident?
